name: git clone
description: Clone a remote repository into a new local directory, copying all branches and history

options.label: Depth
options.description: Create a shallow clone with history truncated to the specified number of commits

options.label: Branch
options.description: Clone and check out a specific branch instead of the default

options.label: Single branch
options.description: Clone only the history of a single branch, reducing download size

options.label: Bare
options.description: Create a bare repository without a working directory

options.label: Recursive
options.description: Initialize and clone all submodules recursively

positionalArgs.label: Repository URL
positionalArgs.description: URL or path of the repository to clone

positionalArgs.label: Directory
positionalArgs.description: Name of the local directory to clone into

examples.label: Clone with submodules into a named directory
Create a bare repository for a server mirror
